name: docsmith
description: Turn markdown into professional, on-brand PDFs across multiple design-system templates. Ships 4 templates — `handbook` (LaTeX book via pandoc+tectonic), `corporate-deck`, `claudecode-deck`, and `kawaii-storybook` (16:9 slides via marp-cli) — each driven by an extracted design system. Diagrams, charts, and icons are hand-written raw SVG embedded inline (no d2, Mermaid, or image generation); one template builds per run. Layered config (global profile + per-template overrides + per-doc front-matter) under ~/.docsmith/.
